feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP GROW – Service Entry Sheet does not recognize quantity
entry.content:
Hello

We kindly request SAP to:

  1. Confirm whether the described purchase order model is supported for Service Entry Sheet processing in SAP GROW
  2. Clarify the recommended service model for fixed-price services that require service entry and approval
  3. Inform whether there is any:
    • SAP Note
    • KBA
    • Known product limitation
  4. Provide SAP best practice guidance to avoid this issue in future purchase orders

 Business Impact

This issue prevents the registration and approval of already executed services, directly impacting:

  • Procurement operations
  • Service approval process
  • Supplier invoicing and payments

 

 

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Edit Existing Process Order Number Range Intervals or Add New Process Order Number Range Intervals
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud there is no separate configuration node to Define new number ranges with new intervals for Production/Process Order Type (SNRO Object: AUFTRAG). We need to assign specific number range intervals as per business requirement for Process Order Types.

Kindly suggest the way around for this requirement in SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Manufacturer Part Number; not visible in Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Our requisitioners must ensure the right material is purchased and often refer to the Manufacturer Part Number for the highest level of precision. 

However such field is not available in the Purchase Requisition apps although it exists in the Product Master Data. This data should not be confused with "Supplier Part Number" which is a slightly different concept.

Please provide a solution for S4 Hana Public Cloud edition.

Thanks,

Adrien

entry.title: Purchase Order Item Related Delivery address with Country & Region required for custom form
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good Day.

I need CDS view to get the Purchase Order Item Delivery address related Country & Region, what the relation between the PO and PO item Delivery address and Delivery address related Country & Region fields. Could you please check and provide the relation among those fields.

Thanks in advance.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with Balance Carryforward and Legacy Data Transfer Settings (CoCode Status & Fiscal Years)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are currently performing the fiscal year-end closing for 2025 in an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. Our Go-Live/Legacy Data Transfer (LDT) date was 31.05.2025.

I am facing an issue where the P&L accounts in the 2026 Trial Balance are showing cumulative balances (not cleared). To resolve this, I am trying to finalize the settings in the "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting Specific" app, but I want to ensure I enter the correct values to avoid any further inconsistencies.

Could you please clarify the following for our scenario?

  1. Legacy Data Transfer Segment: Should I change the "Transfer Status" from "Ongoing" to "Completed" at this stage to allow a clean balance carryforward?
  2. Highest Fiscal Year: Since we are now in 2026, should this field be set to 2025 or 2026 to close the previous year and allow 2026 postings?
  3. Closed Fiscal Year: Under the Ledger settings, should the "Closed Fiscal Year" be set to 2024 (the year prior to our LDT)?

Our main goal is to successfully run the Balance Carryforward (FAGLGV) so that the 2026 opening balances are correct and P&L accounts are zeroed out.

Any guidance on the mandatory sequence for these settings would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Stop system-wide outgoing email notifications
entry.content: Is there a way to stop system-wide outgoing email notifications from SAP S/4Hana Public cloud test system?

entry.title: Unable to assign sales area to plant
entry.content:
Hi,

Please see attached screenshot in the CBC org structure. The sales area are unable to assigned to plant.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to have different vendor on unplanned delivery cost during invoice processing
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to post to a different vendor when using the unplanned delivery cost during invoice processing?

Out business wanted the unplanned delivery cost to be posted as part of the material moving ave price.

Regards,

Fideli

entry.title: [South Korea] DRC Activation and License Usage
entry.content:
Currently, the system is designed to allow activation by country. Since we have two legal entities in Korea, the system is flagging this as excessive license usage (over-usage).

To resolve this, we intend to activate and use DRC for only one of the two entities. However, we are unsure of the specific steps to configure this at the entity level rather than the country level.

Could you please provide guidance or documentation on how to limit the activation to a single legal entity?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to delete uploaded Bank Statement in SAP from "Manage Bank Statement" Fiori app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to delete already uploaded bank statements form "Manage Bank statement" app, however the delete button is grayed out in screen. please suggest deleting it as early as possible.

 

Thanks & regards,

Babita

entry.title: How to check status of all configuration items (SSCUI) in one view?
entry.content:
Hello,

In S/4HANA Cloud Two-system Landscape (Solution Configuration), the configuration status is managed at the Item level.

In the Solution Configuration – Change Phase screen, we can see the status for each configuration Item (e.g. Open, Confirmed, etc.), but it requires reviewing each item individually to confirm the configuration progress.

For projects with many configuration items (e.g. 200+ SSCUIs), it is difficult to quickly confirm:

・which SSCUIs have already been set to "Confirmed"
・which SSCUIs are still "Open"
・the overall configuration completion status

Currently, the screen only shows the status per item and does not allow checking the status of all configuration steps in a single consolidated view.

Is there any "Standard Way" or "Workaround" to review the status of all configuration items at once?
For example:

・a report
・export/download option
・CBC project overview
・or another app that shows configuration completion status

Any suggestions or best practices used in projects would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Moving Average Price is not getting updated
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We would like to inform you that we have created a material master with valuation category X and we have created a PO and GRN and we have noticed that system has not updated the price in the material

entry.title: Missing Email Notification Option for Requester in “Manage Sales Document Workflow” App
entry.content:
In the workflow configuration, email notifications can be set for approvers and other recipients.
However, there is no standard option/recipient determination available for the requester (document creator).
Our requirement is to notify the requester when certain workflow events occur (e.g., approval, rejection, or step completion).
We have explored the available configuration options but could not find any setting that enables this functionality.

entry.title: Margin taxation in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

does anyone use margin taxation in S/4HANA Public Cloud? What is the best way to do this?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition OData Api Rate Limits
entry.content: Does anybody here know the rate limits of the odata APIs provided by S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition? Our customer needs those rate limits for documentation purposes and for technical architecture decision making.

entry.title: Automatic Removal of Dunning Level in Business Partner When No Open Items Exist
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

we are currently using a dunning procedure with 4 dunning levels in our system.

At the moment, the behavior is as follows:
When a customer reaches the highest dunning level (level 4), this level remains stored in the Business Partner master data. It is only reset (e.g., from level 4 back to level 1) when a new invoice is created and subsequently dunned again.

We would like to change this behavior.

If a customer has no open items left (i.e., all outstanding invoices have been fully paid), the dunning level should be automatically removed/reset in the Business Partner master data.

This should apply to all dunning levels, for example:

  • If a customer is on dunning level 4 and clears all open items → dunning level should be removed

  • If a customer is on dunning level 2 and clears all open items → dunning level should also be removed

Is there a standard functionality or configuration option in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that supports this requirement?

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,

Nathalie

entry.title: Correspondence SAPV1 (Journal Voucher Vietnam)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working with the new correspondence SAPV1 (Journal Voucher Vietnam) in public clound and encountered an issue when trying to preview the form. When I open the preview, the system shows an error message

I suspect this is related to missing configuration in the Output Parameter Determination app.

I tried maintaining settings under:
Business Rules → Cash Journal Receipt, with Output Type: FI_CASH_JOURNAL_RECEIPT
but in the Determination Step: Form Template, the available setting table does not include the field Corr.Identifier (which I expected to use to assign the value SAPV1).

So far, I am not able to find where SAPV1 should be configured or which Output Type / Determination Step it belongs to.

Has anyone configured this new Vietnam correspondence before?

entry.title: Currency Mismatch in “Make Bank Transfer” App – House Bank Currency USD but System Showing GBP
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created a Bank Key (Region – GB) and a House Bank, with the bank location set to London and the bank account currency maintained as USD. The bank key region is also maintained as “GB.” For reference, the company code currency is IQD.

However, when we perform a bank-to-bank transfer using the “Make Bank Transfer” app, the system displays the currency as GBP instead of USD, which differs from the currency maintained during the bank master creation.

Could you please confirm whether this is standard system behavior, or if there is any configuration we might be missing?

Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

Rohini Dutta

 

Screenshot for reference

entry.title: Production order PR issue using sub contract
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am currently encountering an issue with PR creation for the subcontracting process in Production Operations when using an external processing control key, and I am unable to proceed beyond this step.

I used the YBP2 Control Key and created a PIR for material T610‑0518‑A, ensuring that both the Material Group (L004) in the PIR and the Material Master match. The material is also assigned to L004 in the master data, and the procurement setup includes a production operation.

However, despite this alignment, I am still receiving a Material Group mismatch error.

For reference, in MRP 2 I am using Planning Strategy 20 (Make‑to‑Order) and the Procurement Type “X” (both internal and external procurement).

and used 30 sub contract in MRP 2.

entry.title: Limit Item PO: Changes to Expected value: Change indicator not displayed in the Standard PO Print
entry.content:
We are using the ‘Limit’ Item functionality in the purchase order and need to see the changes to the ‘Expected Value’ shown as a change in the Standard PO Print.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
